title: dactylorhiza fuchsii var. trilobata
intro: Dactylorhiza fuchsii var. trilobata, also known as the spotted marsh orchid or three-lobed orchid, is a rare and endemic variety of the spotted orchid plant found in the UK. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza fuchsii var. trilobata include its ability to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Dactylorhiza fuchsii var. trilobata is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the flowers and roots being used as the primary sources for medicinal purposes.
